scripts.install:all: npm run install:foundry && npm ci && npm --prefix frontend ci && cargo fetch --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml
scripts.install:prod: npm --prefix frontend ci && cargo fetch --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml
scripts.dev:fe: npm --prefix frontend ci && npm --prefix frontend run dev
scripts.test:solidity: npm run install:foundry && node scripts/forge.js test --root solidity
scripts.test:fe: npm --prefix frontend ci && npm --prefix frontend run test
scripts.test: npm run test:solidity && npm run test:fe && npm run test:be
scripts.build: npm run install:prod && cargo build --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml --release && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start:fresh: node scripts/db-up.js --fresh && node scripts/db-init-rust.js --fresh && npm start
